title: Welsh Chinese Rarebit
description: A Chinese twist on the classic Welsh rarebit, featuring rich, roasted, and scottish ingredients.
instructions: In a separate pan, toast the sesame seeds until fragrant.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers to the toasted sesame seeds and stir for 1 minute.
Add the diced smoked salmon and stir for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the grated Welsh rarebit cheese until melted.
Add the sesame oil and soy sauce, and stir for 30 seconds.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds.
Drizzle the heated malt vinegar over the top of the rarebit.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
Enjoy your delicious Welsh Chinese rarebit!
